title: The Provisions of the Panchayats (Extension to the Scheduled Areas) Act, 1996
full_text: The Provisions of the Panchayats (Extension to the Scheduled Areas) Act, 1996 पंचायत उपबंध (अनुसूचित क्षेत्रों पर विस्‍तार) अधिनियम, 1996 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199640 Act Number: 40 Enactment Date: 1996-12-24 Act Year: 1996 Short Title: The Provisions of the Panchayats (Extension to the Scheduled Areas) Act, 1996 Hindi Title: पंचायत उपबंध (अनुसूचित क्षेत्रों पर विस्‍तार) अधिनियम, 1996 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of the provisions of Part IX of the Constitution relating to the Panchayats to the Scheduled Areas.
